source_old_req: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system collision time constant to 8.0 and the recovery time constant to 5.0. When the value of the distance input port is less than or equal to 10.0 feet, the ACAS_Monitor component shall ensure that the acasRequested output port is assigned the Boolean value true. During simulation, the estimated time value of the outImpact output port shall transition from zero to the constant collision time constant value of 8.0, and the estimated time value of the outRecovery output port shall transition from zero to the constant recovery time constant value of 5.0.

expected_check.note: Existing requirement kept because it is explicit and non-vague.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The ACAS_Monitor component shall set the system collision time constant to 8.0 and the recovery time constant to 5.0. When the value of the distance input port is less than or equal to 10.0 feet, the ACAS_Monitor component shall ensure that the acasRequested output port is assigned the Boolean value true. paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
